## CSAMA

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(anndataR)
library(patchwork)
library(reticulate)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
```

```{r load-data}

```

### analysis



### appendix

::: {.callout-note icon=false, collapse=true}

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
